node.statement: Approx positivity of squares: a•a >= -C eta ||a||^2 1. For a in A (self-adjoint, A subset B(H)_sa), a•a=P(a o a)=P(a^2) where a^2=a o a. By GT-bh-cstar, a self-adjoint => a^2=a^*a is positive in B(H), a^2>=0. By GT-Pprops delta-positivity (x>=0 => P(x) >= -delta||x|| 1), applied to x=a^2>=0: P(a^2) >= -delta ||a^2|| 1. By GT-jb-axiom-sq (HOS 3.1.4, V=B(H)_sa JB algebra) ||a^2||=||a||^2. By GT-Pprops delta<=C eta. Hence a•a=P(a^2) >= -delta ||a||^2 1 >= -C eta ||a||^2 1.
